import{useInventory}from'../../../contexts/inventory/InventoryContext';import{updateInventory}from'../../../managers/InventoryManager';export class InventoryMessageEvent{constructor(callBack){this.connection=void 0;this.parser=void 0;this.parserClass=void 0;this.callBack=void 0;this.callBack=callBack;this.parserClass=null;}parse(wrapper){const items=[];const itemCount=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<itemCount;i++){try{const rawRarity=wrapper.readString().toLowerCase();const allowedRarities=['common','uncommon','rare','epic','legendary'];const rarity=allowedRarities.includes(rawRarity)?rawRarity:'common';const item={inventory_id:wrapper.readInt(),user_id:wrapper.readInt(),slot:wrapper.readInt(),quantity:wrapper.readInt(),durability:wrapper.readInt(),name:wrapper.readString(),icon_path:wrapper.readString(),item_type:wrapper.readString(),item_id:wrapper.readInt(),last_used_at:wrapper.readString(),created_at:wrapper.readString(),// Optional/default fields
description:'',damage_increase:null,health_increase:null,durability_max:null,rarity:rarity,max_stack:1};items.push(item);}catch(e){console.error('❌ Inventory item parse error',e);}}updateInventory(items);const{setItems}=useInventory();setItems(items);if(this.callBack)this.callBack(this);}dispose(){this.connection=null;this.parser=null;this.callBack=null;}}
